basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who have B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical/Production/Robotics and Automation/Automobile or related disciplines, or M.E./M.Tech in relevant specializations are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant vacancies. The Online application process for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started (date not specified) and will remain open until 11 May 2026.

qualification.details: Project Assistant: Essential: B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production / Robotics and Automation / Automobile / other Closely Relevant Degree specialization (OR / AND) M.E / M.Tech in Thermal / Refrigeration & Air conditioning / Energy / Manufacturing / Computer Integrated Manufacturing / CAD-CAM / Engineering Design / CAD/Product Design and Development / Mechatronics / other Closely Relevant Degree Specialization. Desirable: PG Degree in above specialization.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through Online mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 11th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include a B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical/Production/Robotics and Automation/Automobile or related fields, or an M.E./M.Tech in Thermal/Refrigeration & Air Conditioning/Energy/Manufacturing/CIM/CAD-CAM/Engineering Design/Mechatronics or related fields.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Assistant position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600044.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is CMRG/eoffice E-671131/096.
